name: auto-updater
tagline: ClawHub (441★): Automatically update Clawdbot and all installed skills once daily. Runs via cron, checks for updates, applies them, and mes
verdict: Concrete risk: setup adds a cron job by name with no check for an existing one first -- re-run the Quick Start and you get duplicate scheduled updates running side by side. No stated exclusion cases either. Security and hygiene are otherwise clean (both A).

highlights.summary: Setup instructs adding a cron job by name with no check for an existing 'Daily Auto-Update' job first; re-running the Quick Start/manual setup would create duplicate cron entries.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope guidance anywhere in description or body; skill has multiple sub-flows (setup, manual commands, troubleshooting) so misfire is not implausib
Global install/update uses unpinned @latest; per rubric guidance this is warning-level even for a well-known/first-party package, since no version is pinned.
